title: Christensonella cogniauxiana
taxonomy: Christensonella cogniauxiana is classified as a species of orchid, belonging to the family Orchidaceae. It is a type of epiphytic orchid, which means it grows on other plants, typically trees, in its native habitat. Christensonella cogniauxiana is a rare and endemic species found in the tropical forests of Mexico. The plant is characterized by its small size, with flowers that are usually white or yellow in color. Within the orchid family, Christensonella cogniauxiana is further classified into the subfamily Epidendroideae.
